ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "location" TEXT /* City or state where the institution is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Institution's official website */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information, including phone number and email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution providing the enrollment data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the enrollment data was collected */,
  "term" TEXT /* Academic term (e.g., fall, spring, summer) */,
  "level_of_student" TEXT /* Level of student (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "all_students_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "distance_education_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled exclusively in distance education courses */,
  "some_distance_education_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in some but not all distance education courses */,
  "index_ef" INTEGER /* Index of EF (not explicitly defined in the problem) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., online, on-campus, hybrid) */,
  "student_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the students */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Student's enrollment status (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Institution's graduation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_level_of_student FOREIGN KEY ("level_of_student") REFERENCES enrollment_types ("enrollment_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_types" (
  "enrollment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment type */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Name of the enrollment type */,
  "enrollment_subtype" TEXT /* More specific subtype of the enrollment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enrollment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "unitid" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_unitid FOREIGN KEY ("unitid") REFERENCES institutions ("unitid")
)
